description_long: This armchair features a high, tufted backrest with a diamond button pattern, providing an elegant and classic appearance. The upholstery is a light beige or off-white fabric, accented with decorative nailhead trim along the edges of the armrests and back. The seat is generously padded, offering comfort and support, while the armrests are gently curved and fully upholstered for a cohesive look. The chair stands on four dark wooden legs, each with a slightly curved and traditional design, contrasting with the light fabric. The overall silhouette is tall and inviting, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings. The visible craftsmanship and materials suggest a blend of comfort and sophistication.
description: A high-back, tufted armchair with light beige upholstery, nailhead trim, and dark wooden legs. The chair exudes classic elegance and comfort with its padded seat and gently curved armrests.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, padded backrest, curved armrest, and two dark wooden legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, upholstered back with nailhead trim and the two rear legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the armrest curve, seat depth, and leg design.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the tufted diamond pattern on the backrest, wide seat, and both front legs.
attribute_backrest_style: high, straight, tufted with diamond button pattern
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted diamond pattern on backrest, solid color fabric elsewhere
